context:
💡INTEL
=======
📌Bert Group disovered in 6th April 2025; but have been active since Mid March 2025
📌Targets both Windows and Linux Environment
📌Linux ELF is the latest edition as the group started with Windows EXE
📌Adds the extension .bert11 to the encrypted files
📌Listed 6 victims (as of June 2025), 2 from US
📌Victim data is stored in another server, not as same as DLS
📌Both websites are powered by Apache/2.4.52 (Ubuntu)
📌Uses Powershell file for disabling System Checks




DLS: bertblogsoqmm4ow7nqyh5ik7etsmefdbf25stauecytvwy7tkgizhad.onion
Data Server: wtwdv3ss4d637dka7iafl7737ucykei7pluzc7is3mgo2vl5nmq7eeid.onion

http://185.100.157.74/payload.exe
